growth_news.title: Schools Worldwide Adopt AI Tutors to Help Kids Learn Math
growth_news.description: Interactive AI teachers are helping students learn at their own pace, making math feel like playing a video game. Kids are scoring higher and having way more fun!

growth_news.title: AI Valuation Surpasses Traditional Tech Giants
growth_news.description: The rapid expansion of AI startups shows how much people believe in this technology. Investors are pouring support into tools that help design new websites, cure diseases, and create music.

growth_news.title: AI Helps Doctors Detect Rare Diseases in Minutes Instead of Years
growth_news.description: By analyzing medical scans alongside thousands of library documents, AI assistants are helping pediatricians spot rare health conditions early, saving lives around the globe.

growth_news.title: Green AI: Researchers Design Energy-Saving Computer Chips
growth_news.description: Scientists have created new computer parts that mimic biological brains. These neuromorphic chips run complex AI programs using less electricity than a household nightlight!

tech_news.title: Mamba and SSMs Offer Faster Alternatives to Transformers
tech_news.description: Scientists are developing 'State Space Models' that process huge texts in linear time, resolving the quadratic math slowdowns of original attention mechanisms.

tech_news.title: On-Device AI Runs Super Fast Without Internet Connections
tech_news.description: By compressing model weights through a trick called 'quantization', mobile phones can now run complex reasoning engines locally in under 100 milliseconds.

tech_news.title: Analog Neural Network Chips Simulate Real Brain Synapses
tech_news.description: Engineers are moving away from digital ones and zeros by building chips that process electrical current strengths, mimicking biological neural connections.

jargons.definition: A computer brain inspired by the human mind, made of nodes (neurons) that connect and pass information to solve puzzles.
jargons.example: Like a chain of friends guessing a drawing: the first friend looks at outlines, the second identifies shapes, and the third guesses the object.
jargons.use_case: Self-driving cars recognizing stop signs, or smart cameras detecting faces in photos.

jargons.definition: A trick that helps a model look at a whole sentence and figure out how different words connect to each other.
jargons.example: In 'The animal didn't cross the street because IT was too tired,' attention weights connect 'IT' back to the 'animal', not the 'street'.
jargons.use_case: Language translators (like Google Translate) knowing which words are describing who or what.

jargons.definition: Giving an AI a custom open-book library to look up facts before it tries to answer a question.
jargons.example: Instead of guessing the rules of a new game from memory, you open the instruction booklet first to read the exact rules, then explain it.
jargons.use_case: An AI school assistant looking up the exact lunch menu from a school's private spreadsheet.

jargons.definition: Teaching a virtual robot by giving it positive points (rewards) for good moves and minus points (penalties) for bad ones.
jargons.example: Training a puppy: you give him a dog treat when he sits, and ignore him if he jumps. Eventually, he learns that sitting is the best option!
jargons.use_case: Training robot dogs to walk over rocks, or teaching chess programs (like AlphaZero) to beat grandmasters.

jargons.definition: Taking a smart general AI and teaching it extra specialized lessons to make it an expert in one topic.
jargons.example: Taking a high-school graduate who knows basic writing, and sending them to medical school so they learn how to write prescriptions.
jargons.use_case: Teaching a general language model how to write code in a specific new programming language.

tools.name: Cursor
tools.trending_factor: Helps you write software by predicting what you want to build and editing multiple files simultaneously.

tools.name: NotebookLM
tools.trending_factor: Reads your text documents and automatically generates a fun, two-person podcast audio discussing your notes.

tools.name: v0 by Vercel
tools.trending_factor: Creates fully coded, stylized website pages in seconds just from a simple text description.

tools.name: Midjourney
tools.trending_factor: Turn text prompts into highly photorealistic digital paintings and posters with high text accuracy.

tools.name: ElevenLabs
tools.trending_factor: Synthesizes expressive voiceover files with emotional controls in dozens of languages.
